allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/assets/data/us-hospitals.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d._meta,null,2\)\); console.log\('TOTAL hospitals:', d.hospitals.length\); console.log\('Sample records:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d.hospitals.slice\(0,2\),null,2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/assets/data/us-counties.json'\); const k=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('top-level type:', Array.isArray\(d\)?'array len '+d.length:'object keys '+k.length\); console.log\('sample:', JSON.stringify\(Array.isArray\(d\)?d.slice\(0,2\):Object.fromEntries\(Object.entries\(d\).slice\(0,2\)\),null,2\)\);")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8082 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try{ Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $_" }catch{ "could not kill $_" } } } else { "no listener on 8082" })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($p\){ $p | Select-Object Id,StartTime,@{n='cmd';e={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-Table -Wrap -AutoSize | Out-String | Write-Output; "---stopping all node---"; $p | Stop-Process -Force; "stopped $\($p.Count\) node process\(es\)" } else { "no node processes running" })

Bash(timeout 8 powershell -Command 'try { $p=\(Invoke-WebRequest '\\''http://localhost:8080/tools/healthcare-career-tree/'\\'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4\).StatusCode; $d=\(Invoke-WebRequest '\\''http://localhost:8080/assets/data/career-tree.json'\\'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4\).StatusCode; Write-Output "page=$p data=$d" } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message }')

Bash(timeout 8 powershell -Command 'try { $p=\(Invoke-WebRequest '\\''http://localhost:8080/tools/healthcare-career-tree/'\\'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4\).StatusCode; $j=\(Invoke-WebRequest '\\''http://localhost:8080/assets/data/career-tree.json'\\'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "page=$p sides=$\($j.classes.roles.pathways.therapeutic.side\)/$\($j.classes.roles.pathways.admin.side\)" } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message }')

Bash(timeout 8 powershell -Command 'try { $p=\(Invoke-WebRequest '\\''http://localhost:8080/tools/healthcare-career-tree/'\\'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4\).StatusCode; $j=\(Invoke-WebRequest '\\''http://localhost:8080/assets/data/career-tree.json'\\'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "page=$p roles=$\($j.classes.roles.nodes.Count\) families=$\($j.classes.roles.familyOrder.Count\)" } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message }')

Bash(node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on\("data",c=>d+=c\).on\("end",\(\)=>{console.log\("served: solid tab bg #16241f ->", d.includes\("background: #16241f"\)\);console.log\("served: active border #4ECDC4 ->", d.includes\("border-color: #4ECDC4"\)\);}\);')

Bash(node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on\("data",c=>d+=c\).on\("end",\(\)=>{console.log\("served: no-shrink rule ->", d.includes\("#hct-rail > * { flex-shrink: 0;"\)\);console.log\("served: foot no margin-auto ->", !d.includes\(".rail-foot { margin-top: auto"\)\);console.log\("served: solid tabs ->", d.includes\("background: #16241f"\)\);}\);')

Bash(node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on\("data",c=>d+=c\).on\("end",\(\)=>{console.log\("served: grid columns ->", d.includes\("grid-template-columns: 226px minmax\(0,1fr\)"\)\);console.log\("served: grid rows ->", d.includes\("grid-template-rows: minmax\(0,1fr\)"\)\);console.log\("served: rail no flex-basis 226 ->", !d.includes\("flex: 0 0 226px"\)\);}\);')

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/assets/data/career-tree.json'\); console.log\('top keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('meta keys:', Object.keys\(d.meta||{}\)\); console.log\('degrees sample:', JSON.stringify\(d.meta.degrees['MS']\)\); console.log\('roles node sample:', JSON.stringify\(d.classes.roles.nodes[0]\).slice\(0,300\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/assets/data/career-tree.json'\); console.log\('growth keys:', Object.keys\(d.growth\)\); console.log\('zones:', d.growth.zoneOrder\);")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess; $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$p" | Select-Object ProcessId,Name,CommandLine | Format-List })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/tools/healthcare-career-tree/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - $\([math]::Round\($r.RawContentLength/1024,1\)\) KB" } catch { "NOT READY: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/secret-menu/uncharted-general/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "game page: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "game page NOT READY: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

Bash(node -e "const HUBR=30; const f=\(t,m\)=>Math.min\(m,\(Math.sqrt\(3\)*HUBR-14\)/\(t.length*0.72\)\); console.log\('GROWTH font',f\('GROWTH',12\).toFixed\(1\),'→ est width',\(6*f\('GROWTH',12\)*0.68+5*0.02*f\('GROWTH',12\)\).toFixed\(0\),'vs hex flat width',\(Math.sqrt\(3\)*HUBR\).toFixed\(0\)\);")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/tools/healthcare-career-tree/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $ok = \($r.Content -match 'careerLanes'\) -and \($r.Content -match 'bpDiagLink'\) -and \($r.Content -match 'bp-grid-lanes'\); "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) | lane logic served: $ok" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/assets/data/career-tree.json'\); const f=d.classes.roles.families; Object.keys\(f\).forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, '=>', f[k].label\)\); console.log\('---familyOrder:', d.classes.roles.familyOrder\);")

Bash(node -e 'const d=require\('\\''./src/assets/data/career-tree.json'\\''\); const g=d.growth.nodes||[]; const by={}; g.forEach\(n=>{\(by[n.zone]=by[n.zone]||[]\).push\(n.group||n.label\)}\); for\(const z in by\){console.log\(z, by[z].length, '\\''→'\\'', JSON.stringify\(by[z].slice\(0,40\)\)\)}')

Bash(node -e 'const d=require\('\\''./src/assets/data/career-tree.json'\\''\); const g=d.growth.nodes||[]; const by={}; g.forEach\(n=>{by[n.zone]=by[n.zone]||new Set\(\); by[n.zone].add\(n.group\)}\); for\(const z in by\) console.log\(z,'\\''→'\\'',[...by[z]].join\('\\'' | '\\''\)\);')

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/assets/data/career-tree.json'\); const g=d.growth.nodes; const ids=new Set\(\); let dup=0; g.forEach\(n=>{if\(ids.has\(n.id\)\)dup++; ids.add\(n.id\);}\); const noSum=g.filter\(n=>!n.summary\).length; const withSeen=g.filter\(n=>n.seen\).length; console.log\('nodes',g.length,'dupes',dup,'missing summary',noSum,'with seen',withSeen\);")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./_site/assets/data/career-tree.json'\); console.log\('built JSON growth nodes:', d.growth.nodes.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/assets/data/derived/search-index.json'\); console.log\('index items:', d.items.length\); const t={}; d.items.forEach\(i=>t[i.type]=\(t[i.type]||0\)+1\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./_site/assets/data/derived/search-graph.json'\); console.log\('_site parses OK, nodes:', d.nodes.length\)")
Bash(grep -v "^── A.B base-game survival \(community/normal good, avg of 6\) ──$")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const t=fs.readFileSync\('src/tools/healthcare-career-tree/index.njk','utf8'\);const i=t.indexOf\('<script>',t.indexOf\('</style>'\)\);const j=t.lastIndexOf\('</script>'\);const js=t.slice\(t.indexOf\('>',i\)+1,j\);require\('vm'\).compileFunction\(js\);console.log\('JS parses OK, length',js.length\);")
